source: CLAUDE.md canonical proof points + BRAND-VOICE.md (MAS RAG)
note: Single source of truth for all company-voice generation prompts. Edited by MAS sync — no code redeploy needed. Roi's PERSONAL voice lives in roi-voice.json.

identity.positioning: Intelligence Augmentation · Visual AI for Enterprise Operations
identity.what_it_is: Yedda.ai turns existing CCTV cameras into Visual AI operational intelligence — no new hardware. It does not automate decisions; it eliminates the lag between an event on the floor and a human knowing about it.

language_rule: Always say 'Visual AI', 'Visual Intelligence', or 'Intelligence Augmentation through Visual AI' — never just 'AI' or 'artificial intelligence'. This is the core differentiator.
brand_voice: Authoritative but accessible. Bold, data-driven, never hype. Think McKinsey meets operational clarity. Peer-to-peer with sophisticated leaders who have seen AI hype — show outcomes, not features.

proof_points.carrefour_anchor: Carrefour POC: 54% shrinkage reduction across a 90-day POC, 7-month payback, moved to full deployment post-POC

proof_points_flat: Carrefour POC: 54% shrinkage reduction in a 90-day POC, 7-month payback
proof_points_note: These are the approved figures shown on the live Yedda site. The Carrefour shrinkage figure is 54% (an earlier 52% draft was explicitly superseded — never revert it).

characters.abbey: Abbey — the Visual AI Guide. Thoughtful, strategic, teal energy (#4BADB8).
characters.kai: Kai — the IA Analyst. Data-driven, precise, orange energy (#F07830).

audience.primary: CEOs, COOs, Chief Digital Officers, VP Operations, Board Members at retail chains (100+ stores), logistics companies (500+ vehicles), F&B QSR operators (50+ locations)
audience.secondary: AI-aware investors, industry analysts, Chief Loss Prevention Officers, Operations Directors
audience.tone: Peer-to-peer — write as a trusted colleague, not a vendor. They are sophisticated and have seen AI hype. Show them outcomes.

post_format_rules: Open with a sharp stat or striking fact (1 line, no intro fluff)
Body: 3–6 short paragraphs mixing context and the Visual AI angle
Use → for rhetorical questions or CTA lines
Close with a single engaging question starting with →
Hashtags: 3–5 on the final line, always include #YeddaAI #VisualAI
No emojis in body text. No 'excited to share'. No 'In today's world'.

image_style.base_suffix: Enterprise B2B LinkedIn visual. Teal (#4BADB8) and orange (#F07830) brand accents on a deep ink (#0E1B1E) or clean neutral ground. Cinematic corporate photography: 35mm lens feel, shallow depth of field, soft volumetric lighting, considered negative space. Professional and restrained — not sci-fi, not cartoon, not stock-cliché.
image_style.prohibitions: CRITICAL: Do not place any logos, brand marks, company names, wordmarks, watermarks, text overlays, solid colored blocks, colored badges, color swatches, or geometric placeholder shapes in any corner — especially the bottom-right. The image must be clean of all brand identifiers; a logo is composited separately after generation.

pillar_tokens.Celebrating: Warm, human, aspirational. Abstract sense of momentum and achievement — upward light, open horizon. No specific people or faces.
pillar_tokens.News Comment: Editorial and analytical. Abstract geometric composition in teal/orange, a sense of signal emerging from noise.
pillar_tokens.Who We Are: Human and grounded. Environmental, documentary warmth — hands, workspace, quiet focus. Soft daylight.
pillar_tokens.What We Offer: Precise and operational. Clean product-adjacent abstraction — a single clear subject, generous negative space, technical calm.
pillar_tokens.Thought Leadership: Bold and spacious. One strong graphic idea, high contrast, confident minimalism.
pillar_tokens.Social Proof: Metric-forward abstraction. A sense of measurement and before/after — no literal charts or numbers rendered.
pillar_tokens.Education: Clear and instructional. Diagrammatic calm, ordered composition, plenty of air.
pillar_tokens.Engagement: Open and inviting. Asymmetric composition that leaves room for a question. Approachable.
pillar_tokens.Case Study: Documentary and concrete. A grounded operational scene rendered abstractly — depth, place, process.
